name: |-Castle Bleck-| (Super Paper Mario)
description:
This is it. This is where your journey would finally end. The void would grow bigger as it continues to destroy everything in reality, but you’ve made it this far, only one more big thing... then it’ll be all over... then it’ll be all over... go in there... and help every dimension.

(This is from a Mario game by the way. That’s the crazy part.)

(I literally never saw a bot for the Castle itself but I did see one for the whole crew... soooo... yeah.)
creator: IGottaSwitchNamesMan
